raw.official description: Take A Breather rapidly increases Roadhog's movement speed by 30%.
When Pig Pen is triggered, refill 50% Take A Breather resource which can overfill.
Gain overhealth based on how far you pull enemies with Chain Hook, up to 300.
raw.ability details:
* Grants 50 overhealth immediately on hit, and up to 250 additional overhealth based on pull distance.
* Overhealth decays after 2 seconds at a rate of 50 hp/s.
* If you successfully refill 2 ammo, changes your overall dps w/ reload from 154.76 to 164.56.

abilities.name: Chain Hook

raw.shot type:
[[File:Ability-dva7.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Projectile|Projectile ]] Projectile
[[File:Whip_Shot.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Melee|Melee ]] Extended Melee
raw.official description: Drag a targeted enemy to you.
raw.cast time: 0.1 + 0.2 seconds
raw.ability details: * Cooldown starts when Chain Hook ends. * Hooked targets are released if they leave Roadhog’s line of sight before being pulled. * Chain Hook is a [[channeled]] ability; Roadhog cannot shoot or use other abilities while it is active, and it ends immediately if Roadhog becomes [[stunned]], [[knocked down]] or [[hacked]], including their subsidiary effects. * If an enemy hero is hit, there is a ~0.3 seconds delay before the pull activates. During this time, there must be an unobstructed line of sight from the head of Roadhog to the head of the enemy. ** Once this timer ends and the hook starts pulling an enemy towards him, the LoS check is disabled and the target's end location is determined: ** The final stun when the target stops moving is 0.4 seconds. *** The target is pulled at a 3 meter distance from Roadhog, unless it was already closer when hit. *** The end location is shifted horizontally in the direction Roadhog is facing at the end of the timer, up to 70 degree rotation from the location where Hook connected. * Roadhog can start shooting as soon as his chain is gone. ** Once he is able to shoot, the target will lose their stun after 0.192 seconds. ** The minimum stun time if the ability was not interrupted is 0.7 seconds. ** The maximum stun time if Roadhog and his target are stationary is ~1.2 seconds. * Damage is inflicted the instant the hook lands. If this damage is enough to kill the target, the hook will return instantly to Roadhog without holding him in place as it usually does on a hit. * Chain Hook is blocked but not reflected by [[File:Ability-genji2.png|sub|link=Genji#Deflect|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Genji#Deflect|Deflect]]. * A self-destructing D.Va mech can be hooked. * Enemies being carried by [[File:Ability Lifeline.png|sub|link=Jetpack Cat#Lifeline|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Jetpack Cat#Lifeline|Lifeline]] can be hooked. The tether will break. * Targets can be pulled out of Chain Hook by [[File:Life_Grip_Icon.png|sub|link=Lifeweaver#Life Grip|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Lifeweaver#Life Grip|Life Grip]]. * Chain Hook immediately ends if Roadhog is pulled by [[File:Life_Grip_Icon.png|sub|link=Lifeweaver#Life Grip|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Lifeweaver#Life Grip|Life Grip]] any time while casting it.

abilities.name: Pig Pen
shot_type: [[File:Abilities-sigma4.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Arcing projectile|Arcing projectile ]] Arcing projectile [[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect

raw.shot type:
[[File:Abilities-sigma4.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Arcing projectile|Arcing projectile ]] Arcing projectile
[[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect
raw.official description: Launch a trap that slows and damages nearby enemies.
raw.cast time: 0.14 + 0.4 seconds
raw.ability details: * ''Removed in Season 18.'' * Cooldown starts when the ability is activated. * The trap is an [[object]]. ** The trap deploys upon landing on object or terrain with a walkable surface, and bounces off when colliding with other surfaces or a hero. ** Only one trap can be active at a time. An upward arrow above the ability icon indicates that a trap is active. ** The trap can be destroyed while dormant but not while it is in air or once it has been triggered. ** The trap is visible to all players. ** Turrets and [[File:Ability-ashe4.png|sub|link=Ashe#B.O.B.|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Ashe#B.O.B.|B.O.B.]] do not target the trap. * The trap stays on ground until destroyed, a new trap is deployed or until an enemy hero (incl. [[File:Ability-ashe4.png|sub|link=Ashe#B.O.B.|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Ashe#B.O.B.|B.O.B.]]) enters its radius triggering it. ** There is a short delay after deploying before the trap can trigger. ** The player receives a cue when an enemy triggers or destroys the trap. ** Enemies that are [[phased out]], such as Reaper during [[File:Ability-reaper2.png|sub|link=Reaper#Wraith Form|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Reaper#Wraith Form|Wraith Form]], cannot trigger the trap. ** Enemies that are [[invulnerable]], such as Zenyatta during [[File:Ability-zenyatta4.png|sub|link=Zenyatta#Transcendence|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Zenyatta#Transcendence|Transcendence]], can trigger the trap. ** [[Invisible]] enemies can trigger the trap. * Upon triggering all enemies within the radius take damage and receive a small [[knock up]]. The trap then slows all enemies within a larger area and deals periodic damage to enemies while they stay within the radius. ** The slow stacks with other slows, such as [[File:Ravenous_Vortex_Icon.png|sub|link=Ramattra#Ravenous Vortex|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Ramattra#Ravenous Vortex|Ravenous Vortex]] and [[File:Ability-mei1.png|middle|link=Mei#Endothermic Blaster|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mei#Endothermic Blaster|Endothermic Blaster]]. * The trap can be lifted by [[File:Ability-mei3.png|sub|link=Mei#Ice Wall|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mei#Ice Wall|Ice Wall]] and [[File:Petal_Platform_Icon.png|sub|link=Lifeweaver#Petal Platform|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Lifeweaver#Petal Platform|Petal Platform]] if the trap is placed on them afterwards, but they cannot lift a trap that is already on ground. ** The AoE is also lifted with the trap if it was placed on the platform/wall. * Barriers block the projectile and prevent a trap on the ground from triggering through them, but the damage pierces barriers. * If the cast time for throwing the trap is interrupted, the trap will not be thrown and the ability will go on cooldown. * The trap cannot be targeted by [[File:Ability Sombra Hack.png|sub|link=Sombra#Hack|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sombra#Hack|Hack]], and [[File:Ability Sombra EMP.png|sub|link=Sombra#EMP|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sombra#EMP|EMP]] only damages the trap. * The trap is destroyed if [[payload]], [[TS-1|push robot]] or push barricade travels over it. * The trap is destroyed if [[File:Tree_of_Life_Icon.png|sub|link=Lifeweaver#Tree of Life|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Lifeweaver#Tree of Life|Tree of Life]] is deployed or falls on top of it. * The projectile travels the furthest when thrown at a 35 degree angle.

abilities.name: Take a Breather

raw.official description: Heal yourself and reduce damage taken.
raw.heal: 150 per second
raw.cast time: 0.21 + 0.54 seconds
raw.ability details: * The activation is toggled, pressing the ability key again, firing or using [[File:Ability-Roadhog3.png|sub|link=Roadhog#Chain Hook|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Roadhog#Chain Hook|Chain Hook]] automatically stops channeling the ability. ** There is an option to make the ability end immediately after releasing the Ability 2 button. * Restores 450 health at full duration. * Take a Breather has a resource meter which will deplete while Take a Breather is active and recharge when not in use. ** Has a 1.3 second regen delay. ** Excluding the delay, the meter takes 8 seconds to recharge from 0% to 100%. ** Recharge time is unaffected by [[File:Kitsune_Rush_Icon.png|sub|link=Kiriko#Kitsune Rush|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Kiriko#Kitsune Rush|Kitsune Rush]], cooldown reduction or being affected by [[crowd control]]. * Take a Breather is a [[channeled]] ability; Roadhog cannot fire or use other abilities while it is active, and it ends immediately if Roadhog becomes [[stunned]], [[knocked down]] or [[hacked]], including their subsidiary effects. * Damage reduction starts together with the heal after a short cast time. * Damage reduction works even while affected by an enemy [[anti-heal]] effect, such as [[File:Ability-ana3.png|sub|link=Ana#Biotic Grenade|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Ana#Biotic Grenade|Biotic Grenade]] or [[File:Rampage_Icon.png|sub|link=Junker Queen#Rampage|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Junker Queen#Rampage|Rampage]].

abilities.name: Whole Hog

raw.shot type: [[File:Ability-reaper1.png|40x40px|middle|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Shotgun|Shotgun ]] Shotgun (hitscan)
raw.official description: Damage and knock back enemies in front of you.
raw.ability details: * Damage per second: 48 per pellet, 768 total. ** Fires a total of 960 pellets, dealing up to 5760 damage overall. * Whole Hog [[transformation|transforms]] Roadhog weapon: ** Whole Hog does not end when hit by negative [[status effect]]s. ** Roadhog can freely press primary fire to attack. ** Roadhog can still use [[File:Ability-Roadhog3.png|sub|link=Roadhog#Chain Hook|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Roadhog#Chain Hook|Chain Hook]] and [[File:Ability-Roadhog2.png|sub|link=Roadhog#Take a Breather|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Roadhog#Take a Breather|Take a Breather]] during the ultimate. * While firing Whole Hog, Roadhog receives a 25% [[movement speed]] penalty and cannot crouch. * Whole Hog cannot be manually canceled. * Restores [[File:Ability-Roadhog1.png|middle|link=Roadhog#Scrap Gun|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Roadhog#Scrap Gun|Scrap Gun]] ammo when the ultimate ends. * While the ultimate is in use, Roadhog's bullets will have red tracer lines on enemy vision.
